title: Codereview pass 1: scheduled_send exceptions - Fix verified correct
description:
Code review of the exception handling fix for scheduled_send:

**Finding:** Fix is correct and follows codebase patterns.

The added exception handling:
1. Re-raises CancelledError to preserve asyncio cancellation semantics
2. Logs exceptions with logger.exception() before re-raising (matches line 343 pattern)
3. Re-raises all other exceptions so callers can handle them if needed
4. Includes useful context (delay_ms) in the log message

No issues found - fix is minimal and correct.
close_reason: Observation - code is correct as noted
